headline: Best fantasy picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better fantasy picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring harry potter, Orion and the Dark, and Nightbooks — plus more fantasy picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best fantasy picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring harry potter, Orion and the Dark, and Nightbooks — plus more fantasy picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: harry potter
selected_titles.description: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and faces dark forces while attending Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

selected_titles.title: Orion and the Dark
selected_titles.description: A fantasy about a young boy who befriends the embodiment of Darkness to overcome his fears.

selected_titles.title: Nightbooks
selected_titles.description: A fantasy-horror about a boy who is captured by a witch and must tell scary stories to survive.

selected_titles.title: Over the Moon
selected_titles.description: An animated fantasy about a girl who builds a rocket to the moon to meet a mythical goddess.

selected_titles.title: The Witches
selected_titles.description: A fantasy film about a boy who stumbles upon a group of witches plotting to turn kids into mice.

selected_titles.title: Arrietty
selected_titles.description: A fantasy film about tiny people living secretly in the walls of a house.

selected_titles.title: Ponyo
selected_titles.description: A magical animated film about a fish who turns into a girl and embarks on an adventure.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
